_comment: Multi-machine orchestrator config. Add a machine entry under `machines` for each worker host. Set `enabled: false` to disable a machine without removing it.

mac-mini._keychain_note: tmux session 'workers' must be running on Mac (started from Terminal.app) for Keychain access to claude.ai subscription credentials. See README Multi-Machine section.
mac-mini._host_note: Tailscale MagicDNS short name. Resolves to LAN IP when on same network (P2P), or via Tailscale DERP when remote. Works anywhere both machines are on Tailscale. Fallback options if MagicDNS fails: 'Kaitos-Mac-mini.local' (LAN-only) or '100.124.63.27' (Tailscale IP, less stable).

routing._comment: preferRemote=true: enabled な remote マシンを優先、空きがなければ local。false なら逆

_budget_note: worker budget bumped 5→8 (2026-05-28) after Worker #15/#49 (DDL setup+pnpm-install heavy) hit $5 limit before commit/push. C4-style writeup tasks succeeded at $5 (see PR #52). Re-tighten if other heavy categories stabilize.
claudeAllowedTools: Bash(git *) Bash(gh *) Bash(pnpm *) Bash(npx *) Edit Write Read Glob Grep Agent WebFetch WebSearch
claudeDisallowedTools: Bash(rm *) Bash(sudo *) Bash(curl *) Bash(wget *) Bash(npm install -g *)
_unsafeAutoApprove_comment: Set to true ONLY if you accept the risk of workers running without permission prompts. Required for fully unattended overnight runs. Read CLAUDE.md ルール5 before enabling.
